color.$description: Brand-pinned colors carry exact brand-book hexes (Doctor School brand → token map §1.1). System-derived values (neutral ramp, intermediate blue stops, introduced red) are noted inline. Reserved accent palettes (§1.2) have no semantic role.

blue.$description: Brand primary family. 700/500/300 are brand-pinned anchors (Pantone Dark Blue C / 2727 C / 284 C). 100/200/400/600/800 are system-derived around the anchors for tints/hover/pressed.

green.$description: Functional success green. 500 (#009959) is the brand-pinned light fill; 400 (#4ADE80) is the brighter dark-theme fill (dark ink 9.24:1); 700 (#047857) is the darker success as FOREGROUND TEXT on the light card (white 5.49:1) — 500 as text is only 3.68:1 (see success-text, the green mirror of destructive-text).

orange.$description: Brand terracotta/orange accent (brand-pinned). Reserved brand colour (also mirrored in accent.orange); carries NO semantic warning role — warnings use the functional `amber` family.

amber.$description: INTRODUCED functional warning amber — the brand terracotta reads as an accent, not a caution signal, so warnings use a dedicated amber. 500 (#B5791A) carries dark ink at 5.14:1 (WCAG AA) on light; 400 (#F5B740) is the brighter dark-theme fill (dark ink 8.99:1).

neutral.$description: System-derived blue-tinted gray ramp (cool hue ~250 around the brand primary). L values track Tailwind's gray scale; chroma is kept low so it reads as a cool neutral. 900/.21, 600/.45, 500/.556, 400/.704 are the four text tiers (ink / muted / faint / muted-2). 150 and 925 are the subtle section surfaces (light / dark). alpha-* are white overlays for dark-theme dividers and quiet text.

red.$description: INTRODUCED functional danger/live red — the Doctor School brand defines none. #C81E1E carries white text at 5.74:1 (WCAG AA pass for normal text) and reads against white. System-tunable.

accent.$description: RESERVED brand accent palettes (brand → token map §1.2). Tokenised as primitive reserves for future category/gamification surfaces; NO semantic role in this foundation. Out of scope for the auth slice.

base.$description: Brand UI base font (brand → token map §2): Inter — all portal UI, body + headings. Inter is web-available + the shadcn default → no fallback risk. The portal loads Inter via next/font and binds it to --font-sans, so utilities resolve to Inter.

sans.$description: Alias of font.family.base — the Tailwind `font-sans` utility / body default resolves to the brand base font (Inter).

display.$description: RESERVED — Tactic Sans Extended (brand: special/marketing surfaces). Licensed brand face; NOT loaded by core UI. Token only.

brand.$description: RESERVED — Century Gothic (brand: project logos/lockups). Licensed brand face; NOT loaded by core UI. Token only.

social.$description: RESERVED — Montserrat (brand: social-media assets). NOT loaded by core UI. Token only.

size.$description: Neo-brutalist kegel (px→rem at 16px base): 2xs 10 · eyebrow 11 · xs 12 · caption 13 · sm 14 · body-compact 15 · base 16 · lg 20 (title) · xl 22 (h3) · title-lg 24 (listing-card title) · 2xl 28 (h2) · 3xl 40 (h1) · 4xl 56 (display).

eyebrow.$description: 11px — the uppercase plate/section eyebrow of the canvas card surfaces (webinar-card «Эфир № N» plate label; §05 section eyebrows). Sits between 2xs (10) and xs (12); source webinar-card.dc.html.

title-lg.$description: 24px — the desktop listing/webinar-card title (source webinar-card.dc.html: 24px/700/1.3/-.02em; mobile drops to lg 20px). Between xl (h3, 22) and 2xl (h2, 28).

letter-spacing.$description: Neo-brutalist tracking by role: numeric −.04 (tabular figures) · display −.035 · tight −.025 (h1) · heading −.02 (h2/h3) · title −.01 · normal 0 · wide .025 · micro .12 (uppercase micro-label).

container.$description: §09 «Раскладка и ритм» content-column max-widths. `content` (1104px = 69rem) caps article / list / form / detail surfaces; `calendar` (1336px = 83.5rem BORDER-BOX = 1240px of content + 2 × 48px desktop-max gutter) yields the canvas-exact 1240px GRID content on the wider calendar surfaces — the canvas caps `main` at 1240px content-box with the gutter outside (`webinars-month.dc.html` line 44), while Tailwind preflight is border-box, so the token carries the gutter (#1080). The Container primitive centres the column (margin:0 auto) and applies the responsive gutter; below the `layout` breakpoint the cap is dropped (edge-to-edge). Surface as Tailwind `max-w-content` / `max-w-calendar` via the `--container-*` @theme namespace.

radius.$description: Neo-brutalism has NO rounded corners — the structural radius is 0. Every semantic/component radius collapses onto this.

shadow.$description: Neo-brutalist signature: HARD offset shadows (blur 0), never soft blur. Offsets sm 3px / md 4px / lg 6px, base a 2px micro-cast. The cast colour is theme-aware via the `elevation` / `elevation-soft` semantic roles (blue.700→blue.300 / blue.200→blue.600), referenced as CSS vars so the primitive flips per theme without being duplicated. `focus` is the keyboard-focus ring (blue.300 @ 50%).

btn.$description: Filled-button rest offset shadow — 4px hard cast in the INK/structural border colour (neutral.900 → white in dark), the source's 4px offset in the border tone. The generic md/lg shadows cast in the blue elevation tone; a filled primary/destructive action casts in ink, so it needs its own token, not md (fidelity trap: per-variant shadow colour).

btn-hover.$description: Filled-button hover offset shadow — shrinks to 2px as the button translates (2px,2px) into its own cast. Same ink colour as `btn`.

btn-focus.$description: Filled-button focus shadow — the rest 4px ink cast PLUS the 3px keyboard focus ring, composited in one box-shadow so the offset and the ring coexist on focus.

header-chip.$description: Rest offset shadow of the WHITE on-header chips (Войти / avatar / mobile ≡) — a 4px hard cast in the theme-INVARIANT `header-chip-shadow` tone (neutral.900 in both themes), NOT `btn` (whose `border` cast flips to WHITE in dark and left the chip a white square with a white shadow on the navy band, #1145). Mirrors `btn` geometry so light stays pixel-identical (light `border` is already neutral.900) while dark gains a crisp dark offset.

header-chip-hover.$description: Hover offset shadow of the WHITE on-header chips — shrinks to 2px as the chip translates (1px,1px) into its own cast, same invariant `header-chip-shadow` tone. The dark-safe sibling of `btn-hover`.

ghost.$description: Bordered-surface (ghost / secondary) rest offset shadow — 4px hard cast in the SOFT elevation-soft tone (blue.200 → blue.600 dark), the source's 4px offset in the soft shadow tone. Distinct from btn (ink) — the fidelity trap the brief calls out.

ghost-hover.$description: Bordered-surface hover offset shadow — 2px soft cast as the control translates into it.

ghost-focus.$description: Bordered-surface focus shadow — the 4px soft cast PLUS the 3px focus ring, composited in one box-shadow.

breakpoint.$description: Responsive width thresholds surfaced as Tailwind v4 `@media (width >= …)` variants. `sm`–`2xl` are the default ladder. `layout` (56.3125rem = 901px) is the §09 «Раскладка и ритм» threshold: at/above it the Container gains its max-width cap + clamp gutter and the offset shadows sit clear of the viewport edge; below it (≤900px) surfaces go edge-to-edge on a fixed 16px gutter so day-band plates and cards can bleed.
